ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary researcher */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., reinforcement learning, deep learning) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used in the experiment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment in which the experiment was run */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* General notes for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the timestep belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* The timestep number within the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep was recorded */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the timestep belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode within the experiment */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestep the observation belongs to */,
  "observation_matrix" TEXT /* Matrix representing the human observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the human observer */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of the observation (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_observations_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestep the observation belongs to */,
  "observation_vector" TEXT /* Vector representing the system observation */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to record the observation (e.g., camera, microphone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestep the reward belongs to */,
  "original_reward" REAL /* Original reward value before any adjustments */,
  "reward" REAL /* Adjusted reward value */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "reward_source" TEXT /* Source of the reward (e.g., environment, human) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_distributions" (
  "dist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action distribution */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestep the action distribution belongs to */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Log standard deviation of the action distribution */,
  "avg_action_dist" REAL /* Average action distribution */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., discrete, continuous) */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., normal, uniform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_distributions_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestep the action belongs to */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Array representing the actions taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., discrete, continuous) */,
  "action_context" TEXT /* Context for the action (e.g., environment state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "result_context" TEXT /* Context for the result (e.g., training, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., comma-separated, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the code version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the code */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the code version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the code version was created */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of code (e.g., Python, R) */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the code version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., environment, model) */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
